response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced polyglot developer with a strong background in web and full-stack engineering, but he falls significantly short of the mandatory requirements for this role. He lacks the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, possessing only 7 months of professional C/C++ experience from 2015. Furthermore, he does not have the mandatory domain expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking, making him an unsuitable fit for this specific position.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience across various tech stacks and platforms.
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and software craftsmanship (TDD, pairing).
Some exposure to the financial technology sector through his tenure at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ experience, with only 7 months documented in 2015.
Missing required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking.
Lacks demonstrated strong experience with Windows platforms and enterprise SQL databases like SQL Server or Oracle.
